case_title: KELLY MEYER VS. SAUNDRA J MOODY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,187.50 FILED BY MEYER, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT MOODY, SAUNDRA J ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

(SC-105) ANSWER FILED W/PROOF OF SERVICE. FILED BY DEFENDANT MOODY, SAUNDRA J
ORDER (SC-105A) ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF IS "GRANTED". A HEARING ON THIS REQUEST IS SCHEDULED ON AUG-17-2012 AT 3:30 PM DEPT.#506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2012 - CONTINUED PER (SC-105A) COURT ORDER TO AUG-17-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 **(PER COURT ORDER (JUL-23-2012), 4 COURT HEARINGS HAVE BEEN CONSOLIDATED (CSM-12-839931, CSM-12-839933, CSM-12-839934, AND CSM-12-839936) SO THAT ALL TRIAL HEARING CAN BE HEARD ON AUGUST 17, 2012 AT 3:30 PM DEPT.#506. THIS CASE CSM-12-839931 HAS THEREFORE BEEN CONTINUED.)**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-21-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PRESENT ON THE DAY OF THE TRIAL, SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION FOR HER ABSENCE AT TRIAL TODAY. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEYER, KELLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOODY, SAUNDRA J $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,395.00, PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED $500 IN THE JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (C) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
